author: tersec
content:
Dora issue, https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/112133 for example links to https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/validator/2714 as its validator, but it says
> Sorry but we could not find the validator you are looking for. It's likely that this validator is new and still needs to go through the deposit queue. Check back later.

author: tersec
content: and that seems to be the case in general

author: tersec
content: the broken one is https://github.com/ethpandaops/dora/commit/4ee149d and the working one is https://github.com/ethpandaops/dora/commit/6d50229

author: tersec
content: Nimbus has a `glamsterdam-devnet-6` branch, 100% untested but it in theory has alpha.11 (passes tests, should do the 8282 stuff, etc)

author: terencechain
content: thanks! prysm is passing all necessary spec tests
